background_profile.context: rotating shifts and guilt about missed family calls

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Over the last couple of weeks, what has felt the heaviest lately?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Honestly it feels like my body never knows when it is supposed to rest. Even on off days I sleep in broken chunks and go back to work already tired.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Is it mainly the sleep disruption, the worry about mistakes, or both?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Both. I replay whether I missed something on the ward, and my chest stays tight while I check notes again and again.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When the shift ends, what happens to your energy and focus after you get home?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I can still finish the shift, but when I get home I mostly sit there and stare before doing anything useful.

evidence_spans.text_span: go back to work already tired
I replay whether I missed something
evidence_spans.rationale: Repetitive worry that is hard to stop.
Sustained tension and inability to settle.

annotator_notes: Burnout-style presentation with mixed fatigue and worry.

background_profile.context: recent layoff and rent pressure

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has been weighing on you most over the past couple of weeks?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Since the layoffs I wake up late and still feel like I have no real energy. Even applying to jobs feels pointless half the time.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When that heaviness shows up, does it feel more like low mood, guilt, or fear about money?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: It is all mixed together. I keep thinking I messed everything up for my family, and rent messages make me panic before I even open them.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: How has it been affecting food, energy, and the job-search tasks themselves?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Some days I skip lunch and just scroll because focusing on applications feels impossible.

evidence_spans.rationale: Reduced motivation and interest in necessary tasks.

evidence_spans.text_span: I messed everything up for my family

annotator_notes: Unemployment case with clear guilt and avoidance around job tasks.

background_profile.context: new infant and broken household routine
background_profile.living_situation: small apartment with partner and baby

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has felt hardest to carry lately?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: When the baby finally sleeps, I should rest too, but I just lie there tense and waiting for the next cry.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Is it more the tension, the crying spells, or the guilt that hits afterward?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I cry much faster these days and then feel guilty because everyone says I should be grateful.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has changed around rest, food, and basic daily tasks?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Food does not interest me much and even simple chores feel heavier than they should.

evidence_spans.rationale: Difficulty resting even when sleep is available.

evidence_spans.text_span: I cry much faster these days
feel guilty because everyone says I should be grateful
Food does not interest me much

annotator_notes: Caregiving strain case with mixed low mood, guilt, and tension.

background_profile.context: managing a parent's medical appointments alone

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has been taking the biggest toll on you lately?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Most of my day is medicines, appointments, and pretending I can handle it. By night I feel wrung out and cannot settle at all.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When you say you are barely holding it together, what kinds of thoughts show up with that exhaustion?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Lately I catch myself thinking maybe everyone would have an easier time if I just vanished for a while, which scares me a bit.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Have those thoughts stayed at the level of wanting escape, or have they become about hurting yourself?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I have not done anything, but the thought comes when I am exhausted and feel like a burden.

evidence_spans.text_span: if I just vanished for a while

annotator_notes: Passive safety language with exhaustion, not active intent.

background_profile.context: short staffing and angry customer complaints

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has your body or mind been doing lately when work gets intense?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: The store is short-staffed and I feel on edge before every shift. My legs keep moving and I snap at tiny things.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Does that unease stop after your shift, or does it keep running in the background?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: It keeps going. Even after work I cannot switch off and I keep imagining customers complaining or the manager calling me back.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: How has it been affecting sleep, restlessness, or how quickly you get irritated?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Sleep comes late because my mind is still racing through worst-case scenes.

evidence_spans.rationale: Repeated worry about multiple work outcomes.
Difficulty falling asleep due to racing thoughts.

annotator_notes: High-anxiety retail case with strong physical restlessness.

background_profile.context: research delays and social withdrawal

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has changed the most for you over the past couple of weeks?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: For months I have felt flat even around work I used to care about. I move slowly, miss meetings, and then hate myself for it.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When you say things feel flat and slow, what thoughts have come with that?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: It has gotten to the point where I have thought about not waking up, or stepping into traffic on my way in, just so everything would stop.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Have those thoughts stayed passive, or have they become more specific about hurting yourself?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I have not acted on it, but the thoughts feel more specific this week and that is why I am talking about it now.

evidence_spans.text_span: work I used to care about
evidence_spans.rationale: Loss of interest in previously meaningful work.

evidence_spans.text_span: stepping into traffic on my way in
evidence_spans.rationale: Specific self-harm thought requiring urgent escalation.

annotator_notes: Urgent safety case with specific scenario-based ideation.

background_profile.context: late shifts, remittance pressure, and isolation

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has the last couple of weeks been feeling like for you?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I keep telling my family I am managing, but after late shifts I mostly feel empty and too tired to talk.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When the day ends, is it sadness, worry about money, or something else that keeps going?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Money thoughts start the second I lie down, and then I wake up again before sunrise checking the time.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: How have sleep and eating been affected when that pressure stays with you?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Meals are random now, and I worry that one bad month will ruin everything.

evidence_spans.text_span: one bad month will ruin everything

annotator_notes: Low disclosure style with clear financial-catastrophe worry.

background_profile.context: investor uncertainty and nonstop product deadlines

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has your head been doing lately when the pressure spikes?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: People think I am motivated, but mostly I feel wired and blank at the same time. I jump between tabs and finish very little.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When one thing goes wrong, where does your mind usually go next?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: If one investor email is slow, my head goes straight to the company collapsing.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has this been doing to focus, energy, and interest in the work itself?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I try to hide it, but I have stopped enjoying even the parts I used to love.

evidence_spans.text_span: I jump between tabs and finish very little
stopped enjoying even the parts I used to love
evidence_spans.rationale: Reduced interest in previously enjoyable work.

annotator_notes: Mixed activation and flattening with strong collapse thinking.

background_profile.context: परीक्षा की तैयारी और पारिवारिक उम्मीदें

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: पिछले दो हफ्तों में सबसे भारी क्या लग रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: नींद बार-बार टूटती है और सुबह उठते ही दिल घबराने लगता है कि फिर पढ़ाई पीछे रह जाएगी।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: ये ज़्यादा घबराहट है, ध्यान टूटना है, या घरवालों को निराश करने का डर?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: किताब खोलता हूँ पर ध्यान टिकता नहीं, बस यही चलता रहता है कि अगर इस बार भी नहीं हुआ तो क्या होगा।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: नींद, पढ़ाई और अपने बारे में जो सोच चलती है, उसमें क्या बदलाव आया है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: घर वाले कुछ नहीं कहते, फिर भी मुझे लगता है मैं सबको निराश कर रहा हूँ।

evidence_spans.rationale: पढ़ाई के दौरान ध्यान का टूटना।

evidence_spans.text_span: अगर इस बार भी नहीं हुआ तो क्या होगा
मैं सबको निराश कर रहा हूँ
evidence_spans.rationale: खुद को विफल मानने की भावना।

annotator_notes: प्रदर्शन-आधारित चिंता और आत्म-दोष का मिश्रण।

background_profile.context: घर और बुज़ुर्ग देखभाल की दोहरी जिम्मेदारी

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: इन दिनों सबसे ज़्यादा थकाने वाली बात क्या लग रही है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: पूरा दिन घर और सास की देखभाल में निकल जाता है, लेकिन अब छोटे काम भी बहुत भारी लगते हैं।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: ये ज़्यादा उदासी है, अपराधबोध है, या लगातार तनाव बना रहता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: बिना वजह रोना आ जाता है और लगता है कि मैं अच्छी बहू या माँ भी नहीं हूँ।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: खाने, रोने, और रोज़मर्रा के कामों पर इसका क्या असर पड़ रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: भूख कम हो गई है और रात को शरीर थका होता है, फिर भी दिमाग शांत नहीं होता।

evidence_spans.text_span: छोटे काम भी बहुत भारी लगते हैं
बिना वजह रोना आ जाता है
मैं अच्छी बहू या माँ भी नहीं हूँ

annotator_notes: घर की जिम्मेदारियों के बीच अवसाद-नुमा थकान और अपराधबोध।

background_profile.context: सड़क दुर्घटना के बाद काम पर वापसी
background_profile.living_situation: दो दोस्तों के साथ किराये पर

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: पिछले कुछ समय में सबसे परेशान करने वाली चीज़ क्या रही है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: एक छोटे एक्सीडेंट के बाद से सड़क पर निकलते ही शरीर तन जाता है और हर हॉर्न पर चौंक जाता हूँ।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: ये डर सड़क पर ही रहता है या घर लौटने के बाद भी बना रहता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: काम करना पड़ता है, लेकिन मन में चलता रहता है कि फिर कुछ बुरा न हो जाए।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: शरीर, आराम, और बुरा होने के डर पर इसका क्या असर है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: घर आकर भी चक्कर काटता रहता हूँ, बैठकर आराम करना मुश्किल हो गया है।

evidence_spans.text_span: फिर कुछ बुरा न हो जाए

evidence_spans.rationale: आराम न कर पाना और बेचैनी।

annotator_notes: दुर्घटना के बाद की चिंता, बेचैनी और सतर्कता।

background_profile.context: होस्टल जीवन और सामाजिक अलगाव

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: अभी सबसे ज़्यादा भारी क्या महसूस हो रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: कॉलेज में सबके बीच हूँ फिर भी अंदर से काफी खाली-खाली लगता है। पहले जिन चीजों में मज़ा आता था, अब उनमें भी मन नहीं लगता।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब आप कहती हैं कि भीतर से खाली लगता है, उस समय और क्या चलता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: कभी-कभी लगता है बस कहीं गायब हो जाऊँ तो आसान होगा, क्योंकि किसी से समझाना भी नहीं पड़ता।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब 'गायब हो जाने' जैसा ख्याल आता है, क्या वो सिर्फ दूर जाने जैसा लगता है या खुद को नुकसान पहुँचाने जैसा भी?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: मैंने अपने आप को नुकसान नहीं पहुँचाया है, पर ये सोच आने लगी है तो डर लग रहा है।

evidence_spans.text_span: अंदर से काफी खाली-खाली लगता है
जिन चीजों में मज़ा आता था, अब उनमें भी मन नहीं लगता

annotator_notes: रिव्यू-लेवल सुरक्षा संकेत, सक्रिय योजना नहीं।

background_profile.context: नए शहर में तबादला

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: इन दिनों सबसे ज़्यादा क्या बदल गया है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: नई जगह आने के बाद से रात को नींद नहीं जमती और सुबह उठकर भी मन बुझा-बुझा रहता है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: ये ज़्यादा अकेलापन है, उदासी है, या भविष्य की चिंता साथ चलती रहती है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: स्कूल में पढ़ाते समय ठीक रहता है, लेकिन घर लौटते ही लगता है कि किसी से बात करने का मन नहीं है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: नींद, भूख और लोगों से बात करने की इच्छा पर इसका क्या असर है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: भूख भी कम है और छोटी-छोटी बातों पर भविष्य को लेकर चिंता शुरू हो जाती है।

evidence_spans.text_span: किसी से बात करने का मन नहीं है

annotator_notes: तबादले के बाद अकेलापन और हल्की चिंता के साथ उदासी।

background_profile.context: कर्ज और कम होती बिक्री
background_profile.living_situation: परिवार के साथ दुकान के ऊपर

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: अभी सबसे ज़्यादा दिमाग पर क्या चल रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: दुकान का कर्ज सिर पर है, इसलिए पूरे दिन सीने में खिंचाव और बेचैनी बनी रहती है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब कर्ज का दबाव आता है, उस समय शरीर और सोच में क्या होता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: गिनती करते-करते भी लगता है कुछ बहुत गलत होने वाला है, इसलिए दिमाग बार-बार उसी पर अटक जाता है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: आराम, चिड़चिड़ापन और सबसे बुरा होने का डर किस तरह दिखता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: घर वाले कुछ पूछ लें तो मैं जल्दी चिड़चिड़ा हो जाता हूँ और रात को आराम नहीं मिलता।

evidence_spans.text_span: कुछ बहुत गलत होने वाला है

evidence_spans.rationale: आराम न मिलना और तनाव बना रहना।

annotator_notes: उच्च चिंता का मामला, अवसाद संकेत हल्के हैं।

background_profile.context: पति के निधन के बाद अकेले काम संभालना

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: आजकल सबसे ज़्यादा क्या महसूस हो रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: सिलाई का काम हाथ में रहता है, पर मन जैसे कहीं लगता ही नहीं। दिन भर सुस्ती और खालीपन बना रहता है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब आप कहती हैं कि मन नहीं लगता, उस समय अपने बारे में क्या सोच आती है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: धीरे-धीरे बोलती हूँ, काम में भी देर लगती है, और अक्सर लगता है कि मेरे होने से किसी को खास फर्क नहीं पड़ता।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: खाने, चाल-ढाल, और खालीपन के असर कैसे दिख रहे हैं?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: खाना भी बस मजबूरी में खाती हूँ, क्योंकि इच्छा बहुत कम हो गई है।

evidence_spans.text_span: मन जैसे कहीं लगता ही नहीं
मेरे होने से किसी को खास फर्क नहीं पड़ता

annotator_notes: अवसाद-प्रधान केस, चिंता सीमित है।

background_profile.context: नाइट शिफ्ट और कॉल क्वालिटी का दबाव

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: पिछले कुछ समय से सबसे मुश्किल क्या चल रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: नाइट शिफ्ट की वजह से नींद पूरी उलट गई है, और सुबह तक सिर भारी रहता है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: ये ज़्यादा नींद, गलती का डर, या लगातार थकावट के रूप में आता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: कॉल के बीच ध्यान टूट जाता है, फिर डर लगता है कि गलती हो गई तो नौकरी चली जाएगी।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: शिफ्ट के बाद शरीर और दिमाग किस तरह प्रतिक्रिया देते हैं?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: ऑफ डे पर भी शरीर ढीला रहता है और दिमाग आराम करना भूल गया है।

evidence_spans.text_span: दिमाग आराम करना भूल गया है
evidence_spans.rationale: आराम न कर पाने का स्पष्ट बयान।

annotator_notes: शिफ्ट-आधारित थकान और नौकरी खोने की चिंता का मिश्रण।

background_profile.context: recent breakup and remote work isolation

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Pichhle do hafton mein sabse heavy kya lag raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Breakup ke baad se sab normal act karta hoon, but andar se kaafi down feel hota hai aur kuch bhi interesting nahi lagta.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Ye zyada overthinking hai, low feel karna hai, ya dono saath chal rahe hain?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Raat ko thoughts band hi nahi hote. Kabhi-kabhi lagta hai bas sab mute ho jaye aur mujhe kuch feel hi na karna pade.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab aisa thought aata hai ki sab mute ho jaye, uska matlab sirf band ho jana lagta hai ya khud ko hurt karne jaisa bhi lagta hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Main khud ko hurt nahi karna chahta, but woh line dimag mein aa jaati hai when it gets too much.

evidence_spans.text_span: andar se kaafi down feel hota hai

annotator_notes: Review-level safety cue expressed through muted-language metaphor.

background_profile.context: exam cycle and repeated comparison with peers

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Abhi sabse zyada kya disturb kar raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Exam prep chal rahi hai but sleep totally off ho gayi hai. Bed pe jaake bhi formulas aur mistakes hi yaad aate rehte hain.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Ye sleep ka issue zyada hai ya focus aur future worry ka combo ban gaya hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Library mein baithta hoon but focus twenty minutes se zyada tikta hi nahi.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab result ka thought aata hai, body aur mind dono kaise react karte hain?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Phir future ka scene dimaag mein loop pe chalne lagta hai ki agar clear nahi hua toh kya hoga.

evidence_spans.text_span: sleep totally off ho gayi hai
mistakes hi yaad aate rehte hain
focus twenty minutes se zyada tikta hi nahi
agar clear nahi hua toh kya hoga

annotator_notes: High exam anxiety without safety cues.

background_profile.context: business debt and staff salary pressure

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Pichhle kuch dino se sabse zyada pressure kahan feel ho raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Salon ka rent aur staff salary ka pressure itna hai ki subah se hi chest tight lagti hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab salon ka stress aata hai, mind worst-case pe chala jata hai ya body pehle react karti hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Customer cancel kare toh seedha worst-case chalu ho jata hai, aur main sab pe irritate ho jati hoon.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Sleep, irritation, aur relax na kar paana ka pattern kaisa hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Raat ko body tired hoti hai but mind settle nahi hota, so proper rest milta hi nahi.

evidence_spans.text_span: seedha worst-case chalu ho jata hai
main sab pe irritate ho jati hoon

annotator_notes: Financial anxiety with strong body cue and irritability.

background_profile.context: online criticism and inconsistent work cycle

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Abhi sabse bada change kya notice ho raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Videos banana pehle fun lagta tha, ab camera on karne ka bhi mann nahi karta. Bas postpone karta rehta hoon.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Ye zyada interest chala jana hai, low self-worth hai, ya logon se bachna zyada ho raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Comments dekhke instantly lagta hai main enough nahi hoon and sab fake lagne lagta hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Meals, room se bahar nikalna, aur kaam start karna kitna difficult ho gaya hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Uske baad room mein hi rehta hoon, meals skip ho jaati hain, aur low feel karta hoon.

evidence_spans.text_span: camera on karne ka bhi mann nahi karta
evidence_spans.rationale: Strong loss of interest in usual activity.

annotator_notes: Depression-leaning Hinglish case with criticism trigger.

background_profile.context: night process, QA checks, and schedule drift

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Recent days mein sabse zyada kya off lag raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Night process mein kaam karte karte body pura restless rehta hai. Calls ke beech bhi pair hilte rehte hain.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Ye body ki restlessness zyada hai, sleep issue hai, ya job nikalne ka thought loop?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Shift khatam hone ke baad bhi seedha sleep nahi aati because dimaag abhi bhi alert mode mein hota hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Shift ke baad body aur mind kitni der tak alert mode mein rehte hain?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Choti si QA mistake se lagta hai job nikal jayegi, so worry loop chalta rehta hai.

annotator_notes: Night-shift anxiety with strong body-based evidence.

background_profile.context: marriage-related move to a new city

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Pichhle kuch hafton mein sabse zyada kya feel ho raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Shaadi ke baad new city aayi hoon and sab theek bolti hoon, but mostly lonely feel hota hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Ye loneliness zyada hai, low mood hai, ya future fit-in karne ka stress bhi saath hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Jo cheezein pehle excite karti thi unmein interest kam ho gaya hai, aur bina reason aansu aa jate hain.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Interest, crying, aur future ke thought pattern kaise change hue hain?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Future ko leke bhi tension rehti hai ki main yahan fit ho paungi ya nahi.

evidence_spans.rationale: Loss of interest in earlier enjoyable activities.

annotator_notes: Adjustment case with sadness and mild anxiety.

background_profile.context: high-pressure internship and impostor feelings

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Abhi dimag pe sabse zyada kya chal raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Office mein sab smart lagte hain and mujhe constantly feel hota hai ki main bas pretend kar raha hoon.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab mistake hoti hai, uske baad thoughts kis direction mein jaate hain?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Ek mistake ho jaaye toh pura din usi pe atka rehta hoon, aur kabhi lagta hai sab log better off honge if I just disappear from the team.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab aap kehte ho disappear karne ka thought aata hai, kya wo escape jaisa hai ya self-harm jaisa bhi lagta hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I am not planning anything, but that thought makes me realize things are getting darker than usual.

evidence_spans.text_span: main bas pretend kar raha hoon
pura din usi pe atka rehta hoon

annotator_notes: Review-level case tied to impostor thoughts and burden framing.

background_profile.context: career-threatening injury and identity loss

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Abhi sabse zyada kya toot sa gaya lag raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Injury ke baad training band hai and tab se mood kaafi crash ho gaya hai. Din bhar energy low and body heavy lagti hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab career khatam hone ka thought aata hai, tab aapke mind mein exactly kya aata hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Kabhi-kabhi lagta hai agar ye career waise hi khatam ho raha hai toh mere rehne ka point kya hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Balcony wala thought ek passing flash tha ya us waqt jump karne ka risk real lag raha tha?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Last week balcony pe khade hoke socha tha ki jump kar doon, phir coach ko call kiya. Tab se thoughts thode kam hue hain but aaye the.

evidence_spans.text_span: mood kaafi crash ho gaya hai
energy low and body heavy lagti hai
mere rehne ka point kya hai
balcony pe khade hoke socha tha ki jump kar doon
evidence_spans.rationale: Specific self-harm thought requiring urgent escalation.

annotator_notes: Urgent safety case with specific method and recent timing.
